### **Book Online**

The more cheerful way

# Welcome to **HappyHire**

## **Vehicle rental with a cheerful twist**

Conveniently located in central Tonbridge, opposite the Aldi supermarket at the edge of the industrial area, customer parking. Easy access to the A21. We offer cheap and practical Van and Car hire services to the  areas of Tonbridge, Tunbridge Wells, Sevenoaks, Hildenborough, Penshurst, High Brooms, Paddock wood, Five Oak Green, East Peckham and all the outlying villages with our modern and practical fleet of cars vans and minibus.

We also have a hire location in the Safestore car park on the edge of the Holmethorpe Industrial estate, Merstham. A short walk from Merstham Station, easy to access to practical and cost effective Car and Van hire from Redhill, Reigate, Caterham, Nutfield, Bletchingley, Godstone, close to the M25, Gatwick airport and Coulsdon. This part of our operation has combined all the good bits of Redhill Car & Van Hire and a former national franchise to offer the area's best vehicle rental service.

All our vehicles are ULEZ compliant so no need to worry about emission charges in the zone. Our Out of hours key drop allows a more flexible approach to vehicle return outside our business opening times. We have customer parking available for the duration of your hire.

### **Today's Offers**

Check out our page of current special offers for great discounts available across our fleet of hire cars, vans & minibuses.

Book online for the cheapest car and van hire rates

[View our offers](http://www.happyhire.co.uk/vehicle-hire-offers)

### **Our Locations**

Based in Tonbridge we are well placed to offer vehicle hire across Tonbridge, Sevenoaks, Westerham, Paddock Wood, Wadhurst & Cranbrook in Kent.

Based in Redhill we are well placed to offer vehicle hire across Merstham, Reigate, Caterham, Nutfield, Bletchingley, Godstone, close to the M25, Gatwick airport and Coulsdon.

Three good reasons to choose Happy Hire:

**Low Deposit**

**Low insurance excess**

**Lowest Hire charges in the area plus we offer One Day Saturday Hires**

Discount codes available on our [offers](https://www.happyhire.co.uk/vehicle-hire-offers) page

> Reasonable prices and super helpful! Able to sort out a last minute request without any doubts. Highly reccommend!
>
> Zoe P

> What a very good experience of hiring a van. Phil has great customer relations, very helpful, polite and friendly. He turned what had started as a traumatic experience into very pleasurable one. Would certainly recommend them to anyone. Keep up the good work Phil.
>
> Jenny Vinall

> It was an absolute pleasure to work with Happy Hire - Phil was extremely helpful. We used Happy Hire to collect Christmas Trees as part of Demelza's Christmas Tree-Cycle. Phil made sure we had a large long wheel based van which we used all weekend, he even kindly extended the hire by a few hours to help us complete everything we needed to do.
>
> If we are ever in need of a van in the Tonbridge area, we will definitely return to Happy Hire.
>
> Chloe Braidford

> Can't recommend this company enough. Fabulous service. I wasn't sure what size van I needed nor did I have any idea what was needed in hiring a van. Phil was extremely helpful and understanding and talked me through the process. Great customer service and the van was perfect for the job.
>
> Tina Jarvis

> Hired a car for two days in Sept 2019, and the value and service supplied were great! No nonsense approach, and Phil could not have been more helpful, answering all my queries. Got a small car for two days for just under £60. Took ten minutes to do the paperwork and pick it up and five minutes to drop it back. No issues or concerns. Simples!
>
